nasb.text: Truly, O Lord, the kings of Assyria have devastated all the countries and their lands,

esv.text: Truly, O Lord, the kings of Assyria have laid waste all the nations and their lands,

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！亞述列王果然使列國和他們的土地變成荒涼，

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，亚述诸王确实扫灭列国，使其土地荒凉，

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，亚述列王确实使列国和它们的地土荒废，
